title: erobathos coarctatum
intro: Erobathos coarctatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the "button plant" or "button aloe." It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The plant's gel-like sap has been used in traditional medicine to promote skin health, reduce the risk of scarring, and alleviate symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions. Herbal preparations of erobathos coarctatum can be made by extracting its sap and using it in topical creams, ointments, and gels to harness its medicinal properties.
